name: agent-evaluation
description: Evaluation skills for measuring agent quality, building test frameworks, and using LLM-as-a-judge patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Measure, compare, and improve agent quality.
interface.longDescription: A focused evaluation bundle covering test framework design, measurement strategy, and advanced LLM-as-a-judge techniques.
defaultPrompt: Design an evaluation plan for this agent system.
Compare outputs with an LLM-as-a-judge rubric.
Help me build a repeatable quality benchmark for an agent.
